title: Checkout allows overselling out-of-stock items
body: checkout reserves stock but does not re-validate availability under concurrency, so the same unit can be sold twice.

title: Order total ignores discounts
body: order_total sums list prices only. We need to support per-order discount codes.

title: Negative quantities accepted in cart
body: add_to_cart accepts negative qty, letting users lower totals. Reject qty <= 0.

title: Payment failures are not rolled back
body: If charge() fails after stock is reserved, inventory is not restored. Restock on failed payment.

title: Catalog endpoint cannot filter in-stock products
body: GET /products should accept in_stock=true to hide sold-out products in the storefront.

title: Product detail returns 200 for missing product
body: product_detail returns None which serializes to an empty 200. It should map to a 404.

title: No endpoint to restock products
body: Inventory has restock() but it is not exposed via urls. Add an admin POST /products/{id}/restock route.
